creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ian Brennan from comment #88)
Any chance you can boot 13.1-RC1 on this box?
I'm pretty sure that 12.2 hasn't been updated with my changes. My changes were committed last summer (end of july) and 12.2 was released in 2020, and 12.3 is the first release that has them in it.
